programme.desc: It's spring and the geese reach the end of their migration north. Our flock is delighted to be back home(n)

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack, Ah Chu and Tashi find a haunted house in the forest, where Little Sister is hiding a tiger cub. However, she soon finds that others are looking for her new pet(n)

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: BabaYaga offers to magically turn Jack into a great singer - but the spell goes wrong and he ends up swapping voices with a pig(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life(n)

programme.title: Britain's Lost Routes with Griff Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The actor and five companions follow the route thousands of medieval pilgrims took from Holywell, Flintshire, to St Davids in Pembrokeshire. They forage for food, face fast-flowing rivers and sometimes walk barefoot in sackcloth as they come to understand the lengths people in the Middle Ages went to for their religious beliefs. The travellers also encounter grand manor houses, ancient churches and relics, while Griff explores how the British holiday has its roots in the observance of holy days(n)

programme.title: Heyday TV
programme.sub-title: The Kinks in Their Own Words
programme.desc: The leading members of the Kinks who were in the band from 1965 through to 1985 recall their time recording and touring(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad(n)

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Traditionally minded new father PJ hopes his skills as a management consultant will serve him well when he is sent to spend a week working at Tadpoles Nursery in Chelsea, west London, but his idea of arranging a football lesson for the youngsters ends in chaos. Meanwhile, gay budding parent Richard manages to lose track of two of his charges in an art gallery, and 21-year-old first-time dad Kadmiel gets off to a shaky start when placed in charge of snack time and reading practice for the nursery's four-year-olds(n)

programme.title: The Harassed Hero
programme.desc: A hypochondriac is ordered by his doctor to avoid stressful situations. Unfortunately, he inadvertently becomes involved in an explosive international criminal caper. Comedy, starring Guy Middleton and Joan Winmill Brown(n)

programme.title: The Go-Between
programme.desc: When an upper-class woman falls in love with a farmer in Edwardian England, a naive boy helps to keep their relationship alive by delivering secret messages between them - little realising the terrible consequences his actions will have. Period drama based on LP Hartley's novel, starring Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Dominic Guard and Margaret Leighton(n)

credits.actor: Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Dominic Guard, Margaret Leighton

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks alongside a canal in Wolverhampton and to the top of Sour Howes in the Lake District(n)

programme.title: A Tale of Two Cities
programme.desc: A fascinating journey back in time that takes us to the very heart of the city and the period that made the London we know today, the 17th century(n)

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad(n)

programme.title: Posh Neighbours at War
programme.desc: Documentary looking at disputes between residents in upmarket areas of London. Zipporah Lisle Mainwaring hit the headlines worldwide for painting her exclusive Kensington mews in bright red stripes, which came in the midst of an ongoing legal argument about her plans to turn this two-storey property into a dream home, complete with pool and cinema. The programme also hears from author Rachel Johnson, sister of London mayor Boris, who is one of the most outspoken Notting Hill residents on the horrors of living next door to a basement build(n)

programme.title: Storyville
programme.sub-title: Mad Dog: Gaddafi's Secret World - Storyville
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the private life of former Libyan dictator Colonel Muammar Muhammad Abu Minyar al-Gaddafi, revealing his disturbing abuses of power. Filmed across the Pacific, Cuba, Brazil, the US, South Africa and Australia, the programme also considers how Libya's vast oil reserves were a key reason why the 'mad dog', as President Reagan dubbed him, managed to maintain such a strong alliance with the West prior to the Arab Spring that cemented his demise at home and led to his overthrow and death in 2011(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Murder: A Horizon Guide
programme.desc: Michael Mosley uses footage from the BBC archives to chart scientists' progress as they looked at the mind of a murderer in an attempt to understand why people commit such crimes, asking whether they are driven to it by circumstances or are simply born to kill(n)
